PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-26-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Green, in court, for Lee Chen, Petitioner.

The court queries counsel regarding the issue of the signatures submitted with the petition and waiver of bond appearing as the same signatures. Counsel provides oral testimony to clarify the issue and reports that the signatures that he submitted to the court are how he received them from the petitioner. The court points counsel to the form waiving bond is a Judicial Council (JC) form which includes specific information to the signee. Counsel reports that he submitted the attachment because the JC form only includes one signature line. After additional discussion, the court advises counsel that it is satisfied with his testimony and intends to grant the petition.

The Petition for Letters of Administration is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
